title: DNS Security (DoH/DoT & DNSSEC)
description: Deconstruct the mechanisms and benefits of DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) and DNS-over-TLS (DoT). Evaluate the privacy trade-offs associated with encrypted DNS protocols. Analyze the architectural costs and security benefits of deploying DNSSEC.
objectives: Deconstruct the mechanisms and benefits of DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) and DNS-over-TLS (DoT).
Evaluate the privacy trade-offs associated with encrypted DNS protocols.
Analyze the architectural costs and security benefits of deploying DNSSEC.
